phase-plan.purpose: Stand up repo hygiene, RepoPlanner submodule, and a minimal planning loop before building the public site.
phase-plan.scope: In scope: git, `.planning/` artifacts, npm script for CLI. Out of scope: full site UI and content (later phases).

file.description: Living PRD stub embedded as planning reference.

task.description: Keep STATE, TASK-REGISTRY, and ROADMAP aligned as work lands.

questions.question: Which framework and host (e.g. Vercel, static) for the public site?
